summary: Phase 2 testing complete - Pet of the Week and Certification System fully functional. Backend: 21/21 tests passed. Frontend: All new features working correctly.

issues: Minor: Console warning about <span> inside <option> in pet select dropdown - hydration warning but doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for new certificate features
Petbookin Seal SVG component renders correctly with proper sizing
Fee calculation correctly applies tier discounts (MEGA=free, Ultra=50%, Pro=25%)
Certificate ID format follows AKC-style pattern: PBK-CERT-{YEAR}-{HEX}
Transfer history properly tracked in certificate documents
Non-breeders correctly blocked from certificate operations (403 response)
seed_data_creation: Test certificates and litters created during pytest and UI testing (prefixed with TEST_ or UI Test)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 complete. New features tested: 1) Pet of the Week banner on feed (auto-highlights most-liked pet - currently showing 'Max' Golden Retriever), 2) Full Certification System with register pet, register litter, transfer, verify endpoints, 3) Petbookin Seal SVG component. Admin is already a breeder with MEGA tier (all cert fees free). Non-breeders see 'Breeder Registration Required' message and cannot access cert operations.

pet_of_the_week.notes: Returns pet with most likes in past week, falls back to all-time if no recent posts

certificate_fees.notes: Returns tier-adjusted fees. MEGA=free, Ultra=50% off, Pro=25% off

register_pet_certificate.notes: Creates certificate with pet_info, pedigree, cert_id (PBK-CERT-YYYY-XXXXXX)

transfer_certificate.notes: Transfers ownership to another user by email, updates transfer_history

my_certificates.notes: Returns certificates owned by current user

verify_certificate.notes: Public endpoint - returns certificate validation data

certificates_page_ui.notes: Shows Register Pet, Register Litter, Transfer buttons for breeders. Shows 'Breeder Registration Required' for non-breeders

certificate_view_modal.notes: Professional document with Petbookin Seal, pet info, pedigree, transfer history

petbookin_seal_svg.notes: SVG component renders correctly at various sizes with paw print, text arcs, decorative elements

sidebar_certificates_link.notes: Certificates link under Registry section in sidebar
